description: Letter from an unknown merchant from Fustat to his partner Yahya in the Maghreb. Around 1050. The writer complains about his partner and his work in the Maghreb, al-Qayrawān, and Sicily. The writer writes instructions regarding shipment of flax and use of money. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #813) VMR
description_he: מכתב מסוחר אנונימי, פוסטאט, לשותפו יחיא במגרב, כ-1050, תלונות על עבודת השותף ועל משלוחי פשתן
